full_prompt: Design a fuselage longeron-to-frame attachment bracket for a Part 25 transport aircraft per FAA AC 25.571-1D damage tolerance and CS-25.305 limit/ultimate, using 7075-T7351 plate machined to a net-shape bracket. Envelope: 150 x 100 x 50 mm. Interfaces: longeron side four NAS-1351 5/16 inch bolts on 80 x 40 mm rectangular pattern; frame-side four HI-LOK HL-12 5/16 inch pins on 80 x 40 mm rectangular pattern; the two faces are normal to each other (90 deg corner bracket). Material: aluminum 7075-T7351 per AMS 4078 (yield 434 MPa, UTS 496 MPa, E 71.7 GPa, density 2810 kg/m^3, elongation 8%); A-basis per MMPDS. Representative cyclic + limit loads: LC1 limit tension along longeron axis 18 kN (representative transport longeron attachment per MIL-HDBK-5 / MMPDS equivalents); LC2 limit shear across frame face 10 kN; LC3 limit combined 15 + 8 kN; LC4 ultimate 1.5 x LC3; LC5 1-cog fatigue spectrum: TWIST or FALSTAFF cyclic loading representative of 60,000 flights x 1 flight-cycle block each, total ~1e6 major cycles; LC6 damage-tolerance analysis: initial flaw 1.27 mm (0.05 inch) corner crack at worst fastener hole per AC 25.571-1D Appendix A continuing-damage definition, grown under LC5 spectrum. Pass/fail per CS-25.305 + AC 25.571-1D: (R1) max von Mises at limit (LC1-3) <= yield = 434 MPa (no permanent deformation at limit); (R2) max von Mises at ultimate LC4 <= UTS / 1.0 = 496 MPa (no rupture); binding effectively 496/1.5 = 330 MPa at limit level; (R3) damage tolerance: initial 0.05-inch flaw grown under LC5 spectrum must not reach critical crack size in 2 x inspection interval (factor of 2 per AC 25.571-1D for safe-life / damage-tolerance backup); inspection interval shall be set such that a flaw detectable with current NDI (typically 0.10 inch) has life margin >= 2 inspection intervals before criticality; (R4) residual strength with detectable crack shall be >= limit load (i.e., structure carrying a 0.10 inch flaw must still pass LC3 limit); (R5) Kt at fastener hole <= 3.0 (use cold-expansion or interference-fit fastener installation to reduce Kt, per AC 25.571 best practice); (R6) mass <= 250 g; (R7) corrosion protection: chromate conversion + primer per MIL-DTL-5541 Type I Class 1A + MIL-PRF-23377 epoxy primer. Deliverables: STEP AP242; FEA static limit + ultimate; da/dN crack growth analysis with AFGROW or NASGRO; inspection interval determination with AC 25.571-1D compliance matrix.
short_prompt:
Design a fuselage longeron-to-frame attachment bracket for a Part 25 transport aircraft per FAA AC 25.571-1D damage tolerance and CS-25.305 limit/ultimate, using 7075-T7351 plate machined to a net-shape bracket.

Envelope: 150 x 100 x 50 mm, 90 deg corner bracket. Longeron side: four NAS-1351 5/16 inch bolts on 80 x 40 mm. Frame side: four HI-LOK HL-12 5/16 inch pins on 80 x 40 mm.

Material: 7075-T7351 per AMS 4078, A-basis per MMPDS.

Design per CS-25.305 + AC 25.571-1D with an effective ultimate 496/1.5 = 330 MPa at limit level.

Load cases.
- LC1 limit tension along longeron axis: 18 kN.
- LC2 limit shear across frame face: 10 kN.
- LC3 limit combined: 15 + 8 kN.
- LC4 ultimate 1.5 x LC3.
- LC5 fatigue spectrum: TWIST or FALSTAFF representative of 60,000 flights, ~1e6 major cycles.
- LC6 damage tolerance: initial 1.27 mm (0.05 inch) corner crack at worst fastener hole per AC 25.571-1D Appendix A, grown under LC5 spectrum.

Gates: detectable NDI flaw 0.10 inch must have life margin >= 2 inspection intervals; residual strength with detectable crack >= limit load; Kt at fastener hole <= 3.0 (cold-expansion or interference fit recommended); mass <= 250 g; corrosion protection chromate conversion + epoxy primer per MIL-DTL-5541 Type I Class 1A + MIL-PRF-23377.

requires_non_fea_solver.reason: da/dN + Paris or NASGRO crack growth is a specialized fracture mechanics tool.
Residual strength via fracture toughness Kc / K-R curve is post-processing.

prompt.title: 7075-T7351 fuselage longeron-to-frame bracket per FAA AC 25.571-1D
prompt.brief: Design a 150x100x50 mm 7075-T7351 longeron attachment bracket; pass CS-25.305 limit/ultimate AND AC 25.571-1D damage tolerance with 0.05-in initial flaw.

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: residual strength >= limit load LC1 per AC 25.571-1D

requirements.governing_standard: CS-25.305 + CS-25.571 + FAA AC 25.571-1D + MMPDS A-basis

analysis_types: linear static limit + ultimate + crack growth + residual strength

exclusions_explained.vibration_analysis: Fatigue spectrum is the cyclic driver, no dedicated modal analysis.

notes.numeric_source: AC 25.571-1D damage-tolerance framework; TWIST transport spectrum; 7075-T7351 A-basis per MMPDS-2019.
